## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and described in the title
- [ ] Tests or rationale are included
- [ ] Screenshots or demo notes are attached for UI/product changes
- [ ] Performance or bundle-size impact is noted when relevant
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changes
